sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see something important! After SPACE:
- The G at (28,28)-(31,31) became W (white) at (28,28)-(32,31) - it expanded from 12 pixels to 16 pixels (4x4 to 5x4)
- The white strip at (32,28)-(32,31) merged with the G square
- The G square was absorbed/merged into the white region!
So SPACE absorbs the G square into the white strip! The white strip grew from 4 cells to 16 cells (4x4 square).
This is the key mechanic:
1. Position white strip below a charcoal square (aligned by column)
2. Press UP to convert charcoal to G
3. Press SPACE to absorb the G square into the white strip
Now the white strip is a 5x4 white region at (28,28)-(32,31). The blue bar is still at (28,32)-(31,39).
I need to absorb all 3 charcoal squares. Currently I've absorbed 1 (the one at 28,28). There are 2 more: (24,44) and (28,16).
But wait, the white strip is now 5x4, not 4x1. Can I still move it? Let me try moving it to the next charcoal square.
The charcoal at (28,16) is at cols 16-19, rows 28-31. The white strip is at cols 28-31, rows 28-32. To absorb the charcoal at (28,16), I need to move the white strip to cols 16-19.
But the white strip is now 5x4. Can I still move it with LEFT/RIGHT? Let me try LEFT to move it left.
Actually wait, the white strip is now at (28,28)-(32,31). The charcoal at (28,16) is at (28,16)-(31,19). They're at the same rows (28-31), but different columns. If I move the white strip left, it would move to cols 24-27, then 20-23, then 16-19.
But the white strip is 5x4, not 4x1. So it might not move the same way. Let me try LEFT.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# KEY DISCOVERY! SPACE absorbed the G square into the white strip!
# Before: G at (28,28)-(31,31), white strip at (32,28)-(32,31)
# After: W at (28,28)-(32,31) - merged 5x4 white region
#
# So the mechanic is:
# 1. Position white strip below charcoal (aligned by column)
# 2. UP converts charcoal to G
# 3. SPACE absorbs G into white strip
#
# Now white strip is 5x4 at (28,28)-(32,31)
# Remaining charcoal: (24,44) and (28,16)
#
# I need to move the white strip to absorb the remaining charcoal squares.
# Charcoal at (28,16) is at cols 16-19, rows 28-31
# White strip is at cols 28-31, rows 28-32
# They're at same rows, so I need to move LEFT to align columns
#
# But the white strip is now 5x4. Let me try LEFT to see if it moves
action(['LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
